speaker: MATT
raw_text: You guys roll for initiative to see who goes first.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The guy on the left, as he’s leaning back, he’s getting angry with whoever is in that room. As he turns back to take his post again, (swoosh SFX) (gurgling) he just gurgles, slumps to the ground. As he’s slumping, an arrow goes (impact sound) into his stomach. (everyone laughs)

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It’s like a punctuation.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Roll damage for the second attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: The poison dagger goes (thunk sound). Well, I didn’t roll to hit him.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And you are using the poison effect on him?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: 15 on the other guy for me.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That is a 19.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, that hits. Now roll damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: This doesn’t get sneak attack?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Because I already used that. I made some noise hitting the first guy. 7 plus the poison.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What is the poison damage?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: The poison is DC 15.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He does not make the save, even though he’s a duergar.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I go running back up since I’ve already shot my arrows.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Let me check one thing real fast.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And I figured you’ve got this.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Check one thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: He could just clear this whole place by himself.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: 9 points of poison on him.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. So, an arrow (impact SFX) into his chest just as the poison blade makes contact. You can see him (gurgling SFX) double over for a second, but the hardy duergar once-dwarven form seems to shrug off a lot of the poison’s impact.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, shit!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He is still dribbling a very heavy amount of deep crimson from his mouth, but he still (gasps) looks over and sees you both in the hallway and goes to reach for his warhammer and turn around towards the door behind him.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can I throw an arrow at him?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Do we roll for initiative at this point?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, snap!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, it's Kima.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: No, it's a trap ready to hit me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That is 24 versus armor class.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That hits, all right.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, you didn't check for traps.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Didn't check for traps.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I thought you were good at this shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to use uncanny dodge.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What would have been 20 points of slashing damage is reduced to 10. So you take 10 damage as the axe (impact SFX) hits you and imbeds itself in the wooden door, pulls back. Now you see as a duergar wearing this nasty-looking black leather tunic with a hood pulled back, with a giant, gnarled, hefted greataxe, words escaped me on that one, has a bunch of scars on its face. As it's grinning, it pulls the axe out of the doorway.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Right, I spit on the ground, and yank my belt off and throw it at his head.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And I yell ‘hold.’

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. As you throw the belt--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Hold?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, tell him to stop attacking.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, serpent.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: --he ducks out of the way, pulls back out of the way, as the snake forms itself. It goes ahead and makes its attack. Go ahead and roll for snake attack against him.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Snake attack!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay, 12 plus, I don't know what, 12. Is my attack, his attack, snake attack?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Did you roll a 12 on that?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, that will not hit unfortunately.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As he slaps it off himself and it (swish SFX) cascades off to the side of the room.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Is he in a cell?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Is a base attack a straight line from him to Vax to--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He's protecting the cells.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: He's protecting the cells.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: At which point he kicks the door closed again.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can I, in my rage, bullrush through this?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes, yes.
